case_title: ANNABELLE D ABRIGO VS. COUNTRYWIDE, INC.

docket_entries.description: OPPOSITION TO DEFTS' COUNTRYWIDE INC., BANK OF AMERICA, NA RECONTRUST COMPANY INC., ALLIANCE BANCORP, ELECTRONIC REGISTRATION SYSTEM A.K.A MERS DEMURRER; MEMO OF P&A IN SUPPORT THEREOF FILED BY PLAINTIFF ABRIGO, ANNABELLE D

UNLAWFUL DETAINER MOTION 501, DEFENDANT BANK OF AMERICA N.A., COUNTRYWIDE HOME LOANS, INC., RECONTRUST COMPANY, N.A. AND MORTGAGE ELECTRONIC REGISTRATION SYSTEMS, INC.'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT IS SUSTAINED WITH LEAVE TO AMEND TO ALLEGE STANDING RE: PSA; TO ALLEGE FRAUD WITH PARTICULARITY; TO ALLEGE ALL ELEMENTS OF SLANDER OF TITLE AND QUIET TITLE INCLUDING TENDER; TO ALLEGE STANDING UNDER UCL; TO ALLEGE A CAUSE OF ACTION FOR DECLARATORY RELIEF IN LIGHT OF GOMES, FONTENOT AND CALVO. DEFENDANTS' COUNSEL IS ORDERED TO COMPLY WITH SFLR 2.6C IN FUTURE. PREVAILING PARTY PREPARE ORDER. JUDGE RONALD E. QUIDACHAY, CLERK K. LIU, NOT REPORTED.
NOTICE OF RULING ON DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT FILED BY DEFENDANT BANK OF AMERICA N.A. RECONSTRUCT COMPANY, INC. COUNTRYWIDE HOME LOANS, INC. MORTGAGE ELECTRONIC REGISTRATION SYSTEMS, INC.

calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jul-15-2013 Off Calendar

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Jun-21-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Atty. Patricia L. Victory of McGuireWoods (310-315-8200) via CourtCall appearance for defendants B of A, Countrywide Home Loan, Recontrust Co. and Mortgage Electronic Registration Systems, Inc. / No other appearance.

Tentative ruling is adopted, DEFENDANT BANK OF AMERICA N.A., COUNTRYWIDE HOME LOANS, INC., RECONTRUST COMPANY, N.A. and MORTGAGE ELECTRONIC REGISTRATION SYSTEMS, INC.'s DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT is SUSTAINED WITH LEAVE TO AMEND to allege standing re: PSA; to allege fraud with particularity; to allege all elements of slander of title and quiet title including tender; to allege standing under UCL; to allege a cause of action for declaratory relief in light of Gomes, Fontenot and Calvo. Defendants' counsel is ordered to comply with SFLR 2.6C in future. Prevailing party prepare order. Judge Ronald E. Quidachay, Clerk K. Liu, not reported. (D501)
